data.name: Elf World Adventure 11: Halloween Episode!
data.detailed_description:
DESCRIPTION:

Elf World Adventure 11: Halloween Episode is a puzzle game where you assemble beautiful illustrations that takes you into a magical Halloween world where elf girls celebrate under the light of the full moon. This time, you will embark on an enchanting adventure filled with puzzles, mystery, and the cozy atmosphere of an autumn night. Discover dozens of new levels featuring beautiful illustrations inspired by the spirit of the holiday. Piece together images of charming elf girls in Halloween costumes — witches, cat girls, and vampire beauties. Enjoy mystical music, glowing pumpkin lanterns, and a warm, slightly spooky mood that captures the essence of Halloween night. Decorate your Steam profile with themed achievements and show everyone that you’ve conquered all the challenges of this magical night!

ACHIEVEMENTS:


FEATURES:

  • Halloween Atmosphere: magic of the night, moonlight, and glowing pumpkins.
  • Charming Elf Girls: dressed in festive witch, cat, and vampire outfits.
  • Relaxing Halloween Music: immerse yourself in cozy autumn melodies.
  • Steam Achievements: decorate your profile with spooky rewards.
  • Many Levels: enjoy dozens of engaging puzzle challenges.

data.short_description: Elf World Adventure 11: Halloween Episode is a puzzle game where you assemble beautiful illustrations that takes you into a magical Halloween world where elf girls celebrate under the light of the full moon!
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 保加利亞文, 匈牙利文, 越南文, 丹麥文, 印尼語, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 簡體中文, 韓文, 荷蘭文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 俄文, 泰文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 芬蘭文, 瑞典文, 日文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-2300
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce GTX 760 or Radeon HD 7850
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-7400 or AMD Ryzen 3
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce GTX 960 or Radeon R9 380X
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX
